summary: Closed acceptance gaps by enforcing mandatory PostgreSQL locking checks in test flow, exposing missing attendance/inventory optional inputs in UI payloads, and improving frontend visual hierarchy/polish.

fixes.area: PostgreSQL locking semantics in default verification path
details: Updated dockerized test runner to execute backend fast suite first, then a mandatory PostgreSQL locking suite for concurrency/idempotency scenarios.
Added explicit POSTGRES_TEST_DATABASE_URL injection for the PostgreSQL locking test stage.
Changed backend test harness DB env setup from unconditional override to setdefault so explicit PostgreSQL URL can be honored when provided.

fixes.area: Attendance and inventory prompt-level UI completeness
details: Added optional attendance inputs for nfc_tag, latitude, and longitude in both check-in and check-out forms.
Wired new attendance fields into API payloads with optional pass-through semantics.
Added optional expiry_date input to inventory receiving form and passed it through in receiving line payload.
Refined global design tokens and typography with stronger color hierarchy and layered page background.
Improved top-nav, side-nav, card/panel depth, buttons, and table affordances to better fit enterprise retail cockpit expectations.
Added subtle panel entry animation plus reduced-motion fallback for accessibility-conscious motion behavior.

validation.static_checks: No diagnostics reported by get_errors for all modified files.
validation.runtime_tests: Not executed in this logging step. Use fullstack/run-tests.sh to verify Dockerized backend+PostgreSQL locking+frontend suites.
